card.name: Insatiable Hivequeen
card.text: Deathtouch, ward {2} Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, you may exile it. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's an artifact named Cocoon and loses all other card types.

card.name: Nautila, Seapony // Consider
card.text:
Whenever Nautila becomes tapped, you may discard a card. If you do, Nautila becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: Sisters of Sun and Stars // Blessed Light
card.text:
Flying Unite — At the beginning of your end step, if you've created a token this turn, Sisters of Sun and Stars becomes prepared.
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on each non-God creature you control.

card.name: Cris, Curious Changeling // Rite of Replication
card.text:
Whenever you cast a creature spell that doesn't share a creature type with a creature you control or a creature card in your graveyard, Cris becomes prepared.
---
Kicker {5} Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

card.name: Dauntless General
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) You may have this creature assign its combat damage as though it weren't blocked.

card.name: Winpeak Elites
card.text: Lifelink Unite — Whenever this creature enters or attacks, if you created a token this turn, create a 1/1 white Pony creature token. It enters tapped and attacking if this creature is attacking.

card.name: Imperfect Artist
card.text: Flying Cooperate — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn and whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Cynical Hiveleader
card.text: When this creature enters, you lose 1 life and create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Amber, On Fiery Wings
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying Whenever this creature attacks, add an amount of {R} equal to its power. Until end of combat, you don't lose this mana as steps end.

card.name: Mirthful Mailpony
card.text: Flying Cooperate — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn and whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Perfect Pal
card.text: Unite — Whenever this creature attacks, if you've created a token this turn, target attacking creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Winpeak Messenger
card.text: Flying Cooperate — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn and whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 blue Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Deeproot Soothsayer
card.text: This creature enters tapped. {1}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only if a non-Warlock creature died under your control this turn.

card.name: Blazing Kirin
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Savage Descent
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. Create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Perissian Valley // Harvest
card.text:
{T}: Add {C}. This land enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Draw a card.

card.name: Sun Shrine
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever you create a token, untap this artifact. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Badlands Druid // Bolster
card.text:
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Inquisitive Cloudwatcher
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying

card.name: Winpeak Defence
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you control three or more creatures, it gets +4/+4 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Precipice Roc
card.text: Flying Unite — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've created a token this turn, Precipice Roc gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Aspiring Adventurer // Greater Heights
card.text:
Vigilance This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Draw two cards.

card.name: Ancient of Wind // Gust
card.text:
Flying This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Shining Superstar
card.text: Cooperate — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn and whenever you draw your second card each turn, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Lost in the Bramble
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you controlled that permanent, create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Grim Gravedancer
card.text: {1}{B}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Changeling General
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black Insect Shapeshifter creature token. Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Clutches of Death
card.text: Destroy target creature. Create a 1/1 white Pegasus creature token with flying.

card.name: Torch
card.text: Torch deals 3 damage to target creature. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Outland Axebearer // At the Ready
card.text:
First strike, haste This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Unruly Brewer // Bubbling Cauldron
card.text:
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Kirin Trailblazer
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Menace

card.name: Wandering Kirin // Better Together
card.text:
Trample This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Ancient of Growth
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. If this mana is spent to cast your second spell this turn, that spell can't be countered.

card.name: Tentative Hivescout
card.text: When this creature dies, create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Unicorn's Reversal
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Gallivanting Companions
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Unicorn creature token.

card.name: Unfurling Identity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a black Shapeshifter creature with base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Unaware Employee
card.text: {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn. {2}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Crystal Tree
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. {4}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card.name: Wildlands Hunter
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Trample, reach

card.name: Demand Answers
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Pursued by Timberwolves
card.text: Unite — Destroy target creature if it has mana value 3 or less or if you've created a token this turn.

card.name: Disguised Changeling
card.text: When this creature dies, you lose 1 life and create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Gold, Perissian Queen // Sunburst
card.text:
Gold enters prepared. {T}: Add one mana of any color. When that mana is spent to cast a multicolored spell, Gold deals 1 damage to each opponent.
---
Target player draws three cards and gains 3 life. Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature.
